pi_items.source: Confirmed via explicit check in export_result.sh and task instructions

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically seeded SEB Server MariaDB database containing the default demo data. There is 1 institution ('ETH Zürich'), 1 user account ('super-admin'), 3 LMS setups ('test', 'Open edX Ralph', 'Moodle'), 1 SEB exam configuration ('test' with status 'IN_USE'), and 2 exams ('quiz1', 'quiz6'). The expected audit report output path is strictly '/home/ga/seb_audit_report.txt'.
